title: Fantasy Baseball Breakouts: 9 League-Winning Pitchers to Target According to Nick Mariano's Expert Picks
body:
As the 2026 fantasy baseball season approaches, enthusiasts are eagerly awaiting the emergence of breakout stars that will propel them to victory. One crucial aspect of fantasy baseball success lies in the performance of starting pitchers, and several talented arms are poised to deliver league-winning performances. According to expert analysis, a minimum of nine league-winning pitchers are expected to shine in the upcoming season, making them must-own assets for fantasy teams.

One of the most promising pitchers on this list is Cade Horton, a highly touted prospect who has shown exceptional promise in his early career. Horton's impressive arsenal, which includes a high-velocity fastball and a sharp slider, has caught the attention of scouts and fantasy enthusiasts alike. His ability to dominate hitters and rack up strikeouts will make him a valuable asset in fantasy lineups. Another pitcher gaining momentum is Cade Cavalli, who boasts a powerful arm and a knack for inducing ground balls. His impressive strikeout numbers and growing confidence on the mound make him an attractive pick for fantasy teams.

Other pitchers on the list include a mix of established veterans and young upstarts, all of whom possess a unique combination of skills that will help them excel in the 2026 season. For example, Reid Detmers is a talented left-hander with a sharp curveball and a keen sense of control. His ability to keep hitters off balance and limit their damage will make him a reliable choice for fantasy teams. Similarly, Spencer Strider is a hard-throwing right-hander with a devastating slider, which has allowed him to dominate hitters and rack up impressive strikeout numbers.

While some of these pitchers may still be relatively unproven, their impressive preseason performances and raw talent make them well worth considering for fantasy teams. In fact, several of these pitchers are already being touted as top-tier assets, and their value is expected to skyrocket as the season progresses. For fantasy enthusiasts looking to make a statement, these pitchers offer a unique opportunity to get ahead of the curve and secure a winning edge.

As the 2026 fantasy baseball season heats up, it's clear that these nine league-winning pitchers will be at the forefront of the action. Their impressive skills, combined with their growing confidence and experience, make them must-own assets for fantasy teams. By targeting these pitchers in the early rounds of the draft or through savvy trades, fantasy enthusiasts can set themselves up for success and potentially dominate their opponents.

Looking ahead to the season, it's exciting to think about the possibilities these pitchers will bring to the table. With their impressive arsenals and growing confidence, they're poised to deliver league-winning performances that will leave fantasy enthusiasts cheering. As the season unfolds, it will be fascinating to watch these pitchers mature and develop into top-tier assets. One thing is certain, however: these nine league-winning pitchers will be at the center of the action, and their performances will shape the course of the 2026 fantasy baseball season.
